title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Phoenix Asset Holding LLP
body: "Application number 5050  Applicant Phoenix Group Management Services Limited objected to the name used by Phoenix Asset Holding LLP under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 27 May 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Phoenix Asset Holding LLP is changed to OC452499, Ltd. "
